name: Web Application Source SAST
description: VRT-mapped static analysis of web-application source (Python, JS/TS) for the server-side and web vulnerability classes: SQL injection, command injection/RCE, XXE, local file inclusion, SSTI, SSRF, path traversal, open redirect, XSS sinks, LDAP injection, CRLF/response splitting, cryptographic weakness, insecure deserialization, and insecure randomness. Uses light intra-file taint so injection sinks fire on user-controlled data, not constants.
author: NisargHunter AI core

permissions.reason: Reads application source files to analyze; does not execute them.
